name: Cicindelidae
diagnosis: Tiger beetles are a large group of beetles, from the Cicindelinae subfamily, known for their aggressive predatory habits and running speed. The fastest species of tiger beetle, Cicindela hudsoni, can run at a speed of 9 km/h (5.6 mph), or about 125 body lengths per second. As of 2005, about 2,600 species and subspecies were known, with the richest diversity in the Oriental (Indo-Malayan) region, followed by the Neotropics.

genus_notes.cicindela: Cicindela, commonly known as common tiger beetles are generally brightly colored and metallic beetles, often with some sort of patterning of ivory or cream-colored markings.
genus_notes.cicindelidia: Cicindela is a large genus of tiger beetles, found worldwide.

genus_notes.tetracha: Tetracha is a genus of beetles belonging to the Carabidae family.
